summary: Matrix recording of an unknown‑date show with no clear comments on sound quality and very sparse performance notes.
review: The two fan reviews provide almost no concrete information about the music or the audio fidelity. One reviewer gives a 5‑star rating but only mentions the pacing, while the other flags a date error and makes a vague comment about Jerry and Brent. Consequently, both the recording quality and the show itself remain uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief, contradictory reviews (5★ and 0★) with no substantive detail on performance or audio; rating reflects the average star score and high uncertainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss clarity, balance, or any technical issues, so recording quality cannot be confidently assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned in a cryptic remark (“Jerry and Brent came back from the grave”).
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboard) referenced alongside Jerry, though context is unclear.
